title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 20.
content:
There was an Old Man of Peru,
    Who never knew what he should do;
    So he tore off his hair,
    And behaved like a bear,
    That intrinsic Old Man of Peru.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 20.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
